## Manifest type

Parsed manifest representing a CMAF presentation.

**Signature:**

```typescript
declare type Manifest = {
    duration: number;
    switchingSets: SwitchingSet[];
};
```
**References:** [SwitchingSet](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.switchingset)
